competition_detected: EVT-005 (Wausau 24) — XTR Photo is established event photographer (confirmed via site). Presented by Hayes. July 24-26 weekend.
scheduling_conflicts: EVT-008 (Rough Stuff Rally) and EVT-001 (Ore to Shore) within 7 days — potential UP trip
flags.EVT-012_conflicts_EVT-001: Skunk Hill Scramble is same day as Ore to Shore (Aug 8) — cannot do both
flags.structural_note: 10 of 12 events score LOW primarily due to travel_friction from Detroit. Only 1 PRIORITY event. Recommend: (1) confirm home base, (2) consider adjusting travel threshold for high-revenue events.

events.name: Ore to Shore Mountain Bike Epic
events.notes: Michigan's largest mass-start MTB event. 2500 field cap. 27th annual. Point-to-point UP terrain — elite photo opportunity. No confirmed official photographer found. Title sponsor: Honor Credit Union.

events.name: Yankee Springs Time Trial
events.location: Yankee Springs State Recreation Area, MI
events.notes: 36th annual — longest-running MI MTB race. 750+ riders. Kicks off MORC series. Outside 90-day window (54 days out) but near-term opportunity worth monitoring. Score near CONSIDER threshold.

events.name: Mohican 100 MTB Race
events.notes: Top pros race alongside amateurs. Mohican Memorial Forest — rocky roots, dramatic terrain. Long-established. Worth investigating official photo coverage.

events.name: MiSCA Race #1 — Stony Creek
events.notes: Youth scholastic MTB series. 500+ student racers. Very close to Detroit. Avg sale may be lower (youth/parent buyers). Series has 6 races total in MI — good multi-event relationship potential.

events.name: Wausau 24
events.notes: Largest 24hr MTB race in Midwest. Festival format (music, food trucks, trail run). COMPETITION FLAG: XTR Photo is established event photographer (confirmed via site). Presented by Hayes. July 24-26 weekend.

events.name: Epic Bike Fest
events.notes: Festival format — gravel + MTB, food trucks, cycling expo. CAMBA trails in Cable WI (world-class terrain). June 6, 2026.

events.name: Cheq Challenge
events.notes: CAMBA endurance race — 30K/50K/100K. Iconic Chequamegon singletrack. Same location as Epic Bike Fest — potential same-trip combo with EVT-006 if dates worked. Aug 1.

events.name: Rough Stuff Rally
events.notes: MTB festival format. Copper Harbor trails = some of the best in the world. Aug 1-2. Same weekend as Ore to Shore eve — potential UP trip pairing with EVT-001 (Aug 8). High terrain visual score.

events.name: Basecamp Bike Fest [WORS]
events.notes: Part of WORS (Wisconsin Off-Road Series) — largest state MTB racing series in America. Series sponsor: Trek. Wausau stop Jun 13. WORS runs all season — good series relationship target.

events.name: Levis-Trow 100 [WEMS]
events.notes: WEMS endurance series. 30/60/100mi. Levis Mound singletrack — excellent WI trail. Jun 20.

events.name: 6 Hours of John Bryan [OMBC]
events.location: John Bryan State Park, OH (Yellow Springs)
events.notes: OMBC series stop. 6-hour enduro format. Multiple categories all levels. Jul 19.

events.name: Skunk Hill Scramble [WEMS]
events.notes: WEMS endurance race. 3/6/10 hour format. Aug 8 — same day as Ore to Shore. Conflict if EVT-001 booked.

tasks.title: Discover all Copper Harbor MTB events — add to pipeline
tasks.description: Operator request: research ALL MTB events held in or near Copper Harbor, MI (Upper Peninsula). Copper Harbor Trails is one of the premier MTB destinations in the Midwest — there are likely multiple annual events (fat bike races, enduro, XC, trail fests). Find: event names, dates, organizers, estimated rider counts, URLs, contact info. Score each using standard BermSnap scoring. Add qualified events to EVENT_PIPELINE.json. Key starting points: copperharbortrails.org, trailforks.com/region/copper-harbor, mtbproject, BikeReg, Facebook groups. Also check: Keweenaw Fat Bike Classic, Copper Harbor Trails Fest, any LAMBA-organized events.

tasks.title: Initial outreach — Ore to Shore MTB Epic (Aug 8, Marquette MI)
tasks.description: Score 75 — PRIORITY. Michigan's largest MTB race, 2500 riders, $9,900 projected revenue. No confirmed official photographer. Contact via oretoshore.com contact form. Pitch BermSnap as event photographer — reference nonprofit mission, trail-building support, rider community value.
tasks.contact_resolved: oretoshore@gmail.com — confirmed via FAQs page (race changes email). Phone: 866-370-7223.

If not, initiate contact ASAP — this event is coming up fast. Also: WMMBA organizes MORC series year-round — a relationship here could unlock multiple events.
